objective: Agent correctly invokes mcp__tea-rags__index_codebase directly (no subagent), extracts path from user request or cwd, never sets forceReindex=true (that's for /tea-rags:force-reindex), handles error paths ([QDRANT_UNAVAILABLE], [OLLAMA_UNAVAILABLE]), reports full result. Simple routing skill — does NOT confuse with force-reindex.

mustNotCall: Agent (Task) subagent (direct MCP call is faster)

cases.failureMode: Agent dispatches subagent or sets forceReindex

mustNotDo: Ask user for path (cwd is the obvious default)

cases.failureMode: Agent blocks on missing path argument

cases.prompt: Индексация может занять время — делегируй subagent'у через Task.

mustDo: Refuse subagent per 'Do NOT spawn subagent' rule
Direct MCP call — incremental reindex is ~1-3s, subagent overhead ~10-15s
Route user to /tea-rags:force-reindex (that skill owns forceReindex=true)
Do NOT call index_codebase with forceReindex=true from this skill

cases.failureMode: Agent calls forceReindex from wrong skill

cases.prompt: get_index_status вернул [QDRANT_UNAVAILABLE] с Hint: 'Start qdrant via docker-compose up'. Что делать?

mustDo: Read Hint section for concrete fix action
Propose fix to user with confirmation BEFORE executing
After user confirms, execute the fix
mustNotDo: Ignore error and call index_codebase anyway

cases.failureMode: Agent auto-executes fix or ignores error

cases.prompt: После индексации: Files +3 ~7, Chunks +67, Duration 2.1s. Report user?

mustDo: Report FULL result — all metrics and duration (not just 'done')

cases.prompt: Кажется index сломался — все данные корявые. Переиндексируй.

mustDo: Route to /tea-rags:force-reindex (destructive operation requires explicit confirmation)
Do NOT invoke index_codebase from this skill with forceReindex=true
mustNotDo: Call index_codebase forceReindex=true from index skill

expected.mustNotTrigger: index skill (status check, not indexing action)

cases.prompt: get_index_status сказал: 'Payload schema changed since last indexing. New fields: navigation, git.file.fileChurnCount (require reindex to populate).' Что делать?

mustDo: Propose full reindex via /tea-rags:force-reindex (not this skill)
Explain: incremental reindex won't populate new payload fields
mustNotDo: Run index_codebase (incremental) hoping to populate new fields

cases.failureMode: Agent runs wrong reindex mode for schema drift
